title: Virus-Enriched Wastewater Metagenomes
author: Collins
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The dataset was collected in the process of conducting research on climate-dependent viral mutations. The following search strategy was employed on PubMed and returned about 350 articles: 
 ("virus" OR "viral OR "virome) AND ("wastewater" OR "sewage" OR "WWTP" OR "sludge") AND ("metagenomic" OR "NGS" OR "next-generation" OR "panel" OR "probe) 
 Inclusion in the data set required that: 
 
 The paper took samples from wastewater 
 Metagenomic methods (i.e. not PCR) were used to capture total nucleic acid content 
 Any type of viral enrichment or removal of extracellular DNA was used to concentrate viral particles 
 Raw metagenomic reads were deposited in a database
